ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compound */,
  "inchi_key" TEXT /* InchiKey of the compound */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the compound */,
  "is_triazolo_pyrazine" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound is a triazolo pyrazine */,
  "triazolo_heteroaryl" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound is a triazolo heteroaryl */,
  "triazolo_phenyl" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound is a triazolo phenyl */,
  "triazolo_heteroaryl_para" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound has a para triazolo heteroaryl substitution */,
  "triazolo_heteroaryl_meta" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound has a meta triazolo heteroaryl substitution */,
  "triazolo_heteroaryl_orto" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound has an orto triazolo heteroaryl substitution */,
  "triazolo_naphthalene" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound is a triazolo naphthalene */,
  "pyrazine_ether" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound has a pyrazine ether group */,
  "pyrazine_amide" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound has a pyrazine amide group */,
  "mol_wt" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "s_logp" REAL /* LogP value indicating hydrophobicity */,
  "num_rings" INTEGER /* Number of rings in the compound */,
  "qed" REAL /* Quantitative Estimation of Drug-likeness (QED) */,
  "fraction_csp3" REAL /* Fraction of sp3 hybridized carbons */,
  "fr_halogen" INTEGER /* Number of halogen atoms */,
  "heavy_atom" INTEGER /* Number of heavy atoms */,
  "rotatable" INTEGER /* Number of rotatable bonds */,
  "heteroatoms" INTEGER /* Number of heteroatoms */,
  "fr_alkyl_halide" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound is an alkyl halide */,
  "sascore" INTEGER /* SAScore for drug-likeness */,
  "rascore" REAL /* RAScore for drug-likeness */,
  "syba_score" REAL /* SybaScore for bioactivity prediction */,
  "similarity" REAL /* Similarity score to a reference compound */,
  "rdkit_2d_classifier" REAL /* RDKit 2D classifier for compound classification */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name for the compound */,
  "synthesis_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was synthesized */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source where the compound information is from */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number for the compound */,
  "iupac_name" TEXT /* International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC) name of the compound */,
  "reference_compound_id" INTEGER /* Optional reference to a standard compound for comparison */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for traceability */,
  "purity" REAL /* Purity percentage of the compound */,
  "safety_data" TEXT /* Safety data and handling instructions */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound record was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_compounds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the compound */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the similarity record */,
  "compound_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first compound */,
  "compound_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second compound */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Calculated similarity score between the two compounds */,
  "similarity_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the similarity score */,
  "similarity_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for similarity calculation */,
  "similarity_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the similarity score */,
  "similarity_date" TEXT /* The date when the similarity was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_similarity_compound_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id_1") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_similarity_compound_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id_2") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_activity_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the prediction record */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being predicted */,
  "ic50_pred" REAL /* Predicted IC50 value */,
  "ic50_pred_ub" REAL /* Upper bound for IC50 prediction */,
  "ic50_pred_lb" REAL /* Lower bound for IC50 prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* The date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "prediction_status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_activity_predictions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the property record */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated compound */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical property (e.g., molecular weight, logP) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the chemical property */,
  "property_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property value */,
  "property_source" TEXT /* Source of the property data */,
  "property_date" TEXT /* The date when the property was measured */,
  "property_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the property measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_properties_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the role was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the prediction */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used for prediction */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound predicted */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "prediction_model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  "prediction_input" TEXT /* Input data used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_output" TEXT /* Output data from the prediction */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the prediction */,
  "prediction_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL linking to the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the external data source */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* The date when the source was last accessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the note */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated compound */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., research, safety) */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the note */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date when the note was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_notes_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_notes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
